meaning: n.(为征税对财产所作的)估价,被估定的金额
examples: He wrote a very generous assessment of my work.
The government is rejigging some tax assessment methods.
The college has a highly formalized system of assessment.
"The assessment is still under way and this number will continue to grow, " the statement said.
By contrast, the more complex National Assessment of Educational Progress test is designed to study average performance.
